_doc: R76 Layer F — gov #20 NM cap-quality RE-DERIVATION dry-run. READ-ONLY, NO WRITE. Blessed by Scott 2026-06-11 as a data-quality fix to the implausible_unverified flag (it was dropping legitimately-high short-term/low-credit NM deals along with real errors). Deal-by-deal, documented reason per deal, receipts -> Scott's gate before any flag write. Project: government (scknotsqkcheojiaewwh).
scope: 53 not-excluded NM (is_northmarq) rows currently cap_rate_quality='implausible_unverified'. The flag drops ALL of them from the #20 NM line; this re-derivation separates genuine errors (keep flagged) from legitimately-high market deals (reclassify into the cohort).

rules.drop_error_extreme: cap > 13% — physically impossible cap (e.g. 22.42% DEA 2002). Genuine error; KEEP FLAGGED.
rules.drop_error_low_outlier: cap < 5% — too-low outlier (price/NOI error or a sub-5 trophy that is NOT a market comp). KEEP FLAGGED / separate review.
rules.drop_suspect_longfirm_fed: federal AND firm/total term >= 7y AND cap 8-11% — a long federal lease should trade ~6-7%; a 9%+ print is a likely NOI/price/RBA error. KEEP FLAGGED pending per-deal confirm.
rules.keep_short_or_holdover: remaining firm term < 3y OR holdover (negative firm) — short/expiring leases genuinely trade wider. RECLASSIFY into the NM cohort (clear stated cap, sane $/sf).
rules.keep_low_credit: tenant credit is State/Local (not Federal) — lower-credit gov genuinely trades wider. RECLASSIFY into the NM cohort.
rules.review_midterm: mid-term federal with no decisive signal — NEEDS SCOTT'S PER-DEAL EYES (do not auto-reclassify).

resulting_nm_cohort_cap.interpretation: The honest NM number is ~7.5% (if only the 15 high-confidence legit highs come in) to ~7.9% (if the 21 mid-term federals are also legitimate) — NOT 6.89% (biased low: drops legit highs) and NOT 8.24% (biased high: includes the 14 genuine errors).

keep_short_or_holdover: 2600 W Hillsboro AR SSA 8.82% firm -1.58y holdover
keep_low_credit: 2001 NE Jefferson IL DCFS State 9.98% term 1.21y
1616 Rothwell TX Dept Criminal Justice State 9.70%
drop_suspect_longfirm_fed: 3801 S Port Ave TX SSA 9.84% firm 9.70y

next: Scott reviews the 21 review_midterm per-deal (and confirms the 14 drops + 15 keeps). On his gate: re-stamp the reclassified rows' cap_rate_quality (e.g. stated_only) so they enter the #20 NM cohort; THEN the basis (raw window vs curated) is decided on the corrected cohort. No write until his gate.
